header.title: Worship
header.lead: Sunday services that gather us around weekly themes — to reflect, sing, and grow together.

services.heading: Sunday Services
services.body: From September through mid-June we worship together on Sundays at 10:30am, with services built around a weekly theme. In summer, we gather for lay-led chapel services in a more intimate setting. Whether in person or online, all are welcome.

items.title: Water Celebration
items.text: We begin the church year by mingling waters gathered over the summer.

items.title: Flower Communion
items.text: Each person brings a flower and takes home another — a symbol of our shared community.

items.title: Blessing of the Animals
items.text: We welcome our beloved companion animals for a blessing.

items.title: Christmas Eve Lessons & Carols
items.text: A candlelit service of readings and music.

items.title: Weddings
items.text: Ceremonies for all couples, including same-sex and interfaith marriages.

items.title: Child Dedications
items.text: Welcoming children with a ritual of water and rose.

items.title: Youth Passages
items.text: Bridging ceremonies and Coming of Age programs that honor growth.

items.title: Memorial Services
items.text: Celebrations of life that honor those we have loved and lost.
